query:
SELECT 
  id, sceneIndex, mvSceneStatus, taskId, 
  LEFT(errorMessage, 80) AS err,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) AS secs_since_update
FROM musicVideoScenes 
WHERE jobId = 510025 
ORDER BY sceneIndex;
